hitl_ruling.rationale: Identical-answerer ACCURACY is highly retrieval-gated; the substantive 0.8.3 result is the retrieval-precision finding, not a fully-powered citable accuracy number. Characterize honestly, land, and close. No further priced spend (also blocked by an OpenAI gpt-5.4 project usage-limit).

resolution.headline: Provisional parity-or-better with Mem0 via a retrieval-PRECISION lever (CE-rerank at tuned blend weight alpha=1.0). Taken AS-IS per the 2026-06-23 HITL ruling; NOT a fully-powered citable parity/surpass claim.
resolution.frozen_rule_status: decide_083 = NOT_REACHED on the powered baseline (eu7-blocked + underpowered); the tuned alpha=1.0 arm is ABORTED_INCOMPLETE (completeness 0.5842 < 1.0, just-underpowered MDE 0.078 > eps 0.05). A strict REACHED is not available.
resolution.axis: end-to-end agentic-memory answer accuracy vs Mem0-OSS, identical answerer (gpt-5.4), LongMemEval + LOCOMO, 4 classes; PerClassScorer.
resolution.lever: in-footprint CE-rerank (TinyBERT, CPU) over the fused top-K with the CE-blend weight retuned from the production alpha=0.3 to alpha=1.0 (pool_n=10); recovered offline via the score=0 ce_norm trick, no Rust rebuild.
resolution.footprint: in-footprint (CPU-only library query path; LLM answerer is EVAL-ONLY).

evidence_chain.result: FathomDB trailed Mem0 by -20..27pp accuracy (factoid -23.7, ku -27.3, multi_session -20.0; temporal -3.3 tie) at production blend alpha=0.3. decide_083 = NOT_REACHED (blocked_by eu7 + all classes underpowered).

Cause is RETRIEVAL PRECISION, not answer-formation: oracle (clean gold-only) context lifts FathomDB ABOVE Mem0 (R=+0.392 pooled); a blind LLM distiller HURTS (confounded by lossiness). Parity reachable in-footprint via precision levers.
lever PASS but marginal: +0.0495 pooled (powered, CI [+0.028,+0.073], MDE 0.032), closes only ~27% of the Mem0 gap (<0.50 GO bar). go=False. multi_session FAIL.
The CE-blend weight alpha (hardcoded 0.3) is the dominant under-tuned knob. alpha=1.0/pool_n=10 maximizes top-rank gold concentration (MRR 0.347->0.587, r@1 x3.9) while preserving Recall@10.

evidence_chain.step: CE-rerank accuracy arm, alpha=1.0 reblend (PARTIAL, n=354/606)
evidence_chain.result: ABORTED_INCOMPLETE (completeness 0.5842). Provisional SURPASS signal on the answered cells.

alpha1_provisional_numbers.status: PROVISIONAL / ABORTED_INCOMPLETE / just-underpowered — taken as-is, NOT citable.

honesty_caveats: The alpha=1.0 run is ABORTED_INCOMPLETE (completeness 0.5842; the completeness guard correctly refused to cite it).
Just-underpowered: pooled MDE 0.078 > eps 0.05; per-class all underpowered.

SUBSET-BIAS DIRECTION: the 42% unanswered cells halted on an OpenAI gpt-5.4 project usage-limit; these skew toward the large-context multi_session/temporal cells, which are disproportionately FathomDB-retrieval-FAILURE cells (alpha=0.3 accuracy ~0.048) where Mem0 wins. So the answered-cell +0.21 surpass OVER-STATES the full-606 population; the decomposition-adjusted full-606 estimate is ~0.33-0.35 vs Mem0 0.323 = marginal PARITY, not a clean surpass.

The paired alpha=0.3->alpha=1.0 lift (+0.241) is on identical cells and so is NOT a subset-difficulty artifact — the alpha LEVER is real and large; only the absolute parity-vs-surpass magnitude on the full population is uncertain.
decide_083 strict REACHED is unavailable: eu7=0.896<0.90 (case-A/SUT, not CLS) blocks regardless of power, and the arm is incomplete + underpowered.

supporting_findings.slice_15b_d2: proxy code only; full D2 deferred.
supporting_findings.eu7_bisect: 0.937->0.896 = case-A (vector-stage/SUT), NOT CLS; Slice-20 recovery fork = quant-path (whitening->K>192->2-bit).

surpass_option.protocol: Per the design surpass-before-sign-off protocol, the HITL chooses between SHIP-AT-PARITY and SPEND-TO-SURPASS.
surpass_option.where_surpass_lives: The remaining ceiling is retrieval RECALL on multi_session/temporal (where Mem0's retrieval beats FathomDB's). Reranking/MMR only reorder what retrieval surfaced and cannot add missing gold, so they cannot lift those cells. Surpass requires a recall lever (D2 fielded enrichment at scale; index-key enrichment), which is 0.8.4-scoped work.
surpass_option.recommendation: SHIP-AT-PARITY for 0.8.3: bank the in-footprint CE-rerank alpha=1.0 retune as the engine wire (Slice-20 5b), close 0.8.3 on provisional parity-or-better, and pursue surpass via recall in 0.8.4 alongside the GraphRAG track. Rationale: the priced surpass run is blocked (OpenAI usage-limit) and the surpass mechanism (recall) is a different lever than the one this version validated.
surpass_option.engine_wire: Raise the CE-rerank blend weight from ALPHA=0.3 toward ~1.0 with a narrow pool (pool_n~10) in fathomdb-engine ce_rerank; lifts FathomDB ~0.186 -> ~0.33. Re-clear eu7 >=0.90 fresh on the vector_stage_only seam after any re-embed (quant-path fork if breach).

budget.note: Binding constraint on completion was the OpenAI gpt-5.4 project USAGE-LIMIT, not the budget.

forward.0_8_4_opening: S1 community-summaries (Leiden -> LLM summaries -> map-reduce QA) PAIRED with G-HH-2 head-to-head vs running GraphRAG on AP-News/BenchmarkQED; HippoRAG parked (PPR-over-graph refuted twice). Recall levers for Mem0-surpass fold in here too.
